zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd.於1101年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Gronwy ap Rhydderch-16歲，母親Margaret Verch Madog-24歲。他和Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd.于1101年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Gronwy ap Rhydderch-16岁，母亲Margaret Verch Madog-24岁。他和Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Goronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Anglicized form of   Cadwgan .  It was revived in the 19th century, perhaps in part as a transferred use of the surname.

variants.name: Cadwgawn
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. was born in 1101, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gronwy ap Rhydderch, was -16 and his mother, Margaret Verch Madog, was -24. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. est né en 1101, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gronwy ap Rhydderch, avait -16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Verch Madog, avait -24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. 1101 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy ap Rhydderch -16 und seine Mutter Margaret Verch Madog -24. Er hatte mit Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. è nato il nel 1101 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gronwy ap Rhydderch, aveva -16 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Verch Madog, aveva -24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: イギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd.が1101年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gronwy ap Rhydderchは-16歳，母Margaret Verch Madogは-24歳であった。彼はMrs. Goronwy ap Codwganとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd.(이)가 1101년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy ap Rhydderch(은)는 -16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Verch Madog(은)는 -24세였다. 그는 Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. nasceu em 1101, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gronwy ap Rhydderch, tinha -16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Verch Madog, tinha -24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. родился в 1101 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gronwy ap Rhydderch было -16 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Verch Madog, -24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Goronwy ap Cadwgan ab Elystan Glodrydd. nació en 1101, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gronwy ap Rhydderch, tenía -16 años y su mamá, Margaret Verch Madog, tenía -24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Goronwy ap Codwgan. Murió en su pueblo.
